title: ImmPRESS Polymer Detection Following BaseScope In Situ Hybridization
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"i6hi","text":"Protocol for performing ImmPRESS immunostaining with alkaline phosphatase labeling after BaseScope In Situ Hybridization mouse brain sections.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"4gj9v","text":"Reagents: ImmPRESS‱-AP Horse Anti-Rabbit IgG Polymer Detection Kit (MP-5401; Vector Labs) Vector‱ Blue\n","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":18,"length":1},{"key":1,"offset":96,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"ftfpb","text":"Alkaline Phosphatase Substrate (SK-5300; Vector Labs)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"2B2AAF7FFE6311EE93260A58A9FEAC02","name":":registered:"}},"1":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"2B2AAF7FFE6311EE93260A58A9FEAC02","name":":registered:"}}}}
steps: Complete BaseScope in situ hybridization using 35um mouse brain sections. Do not dry slides. For BaseScope protocol see : ( dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.5qpvo364zv4o/v1 )
Wash slides 2 times in PBS at room temp 5 minutes each wash
Incubate sections in rabbit anti TH (1:500) in 0.4% BSA, 5% horse serum and 0.1% tritonX-100 overnight at 4 degrees C
Block sections in 0.4% Bovine Serum Albumin (BSA), 10% horse serum, 0.3% triton X-100 for 1 hour at room temp
Wash slides in PBS at room temp (3 times 5 minutes each wash)
Incubate slides in secondary antibody (ImmPRESS-AP Polymer Reagent) at room temp for 2 hours.
Wash slides in PBS at room temp (3 times 5 minutes each wash)
Prepare the Alkaline Phosphatase Substrate a. Make 2.5mL 100mM Tris-HCl, pH 8.2 b. Add 1 drop of Reagent 1 c. Add 1 drop of Reagent 2 d. Add 1 drop of Reagent 3 e. Mix well – use immediately
Incubate sections in alkaline phosphatase substrate for 5 minutes
Wash slides in PBS (2 times 5 min each wash)
Dry slides at 60°C for ≥15min until they are completely dry
creator: madalynn.erb Erb
